archimate:Principle.name: 5. Strengthen European Strategic Autonomy
archimate:Principle.documentation: Ensuring that digital twin solutions are built and governed according to European standards and values is a priority for LDT CitiVERSE EDIC. The project emphasizes the development of digital skills and knowledge within the region, safeguarding EU digital sovereignty. This autonomy reinforces the supply chain by building capacity within Europe to develop, deploy, and manage digital twin solutions independently.
